accepted_sources_summary.summary: Canonical outcome-core baseline after accepted packages 1 and 2.
Outcome-only state, PDA, instruction, event, and deterministic math surfaces.
Replay verifier by signature plus bounded localnet smoke and negative coverage.
Four active blessed canonical devnet signatures replay to MATCH / OK, including W3O1 v3 rank_desc and closest_to.
Operator-side resolve is bundled without monorepo-only runtime paths.
Adapter evidence remains docs-only and is not exported as public code.

notes: This repository is the standalone hackathon repo and the reviewer/runtime flow runs from repo root.
Historical localnet signatures are not treated as evergreen public acceptance fixtures.
Legacy compiled spec and metrics appendix files are not part of the active standalone runtime surface.
The ecosystem monorepo continues separately and is not required for replay or operator resolve flows.
The current canonical evidence set is program 9tEram... with Raffle, Rewards Selection, Trading Competition, and Prediction Market active signatures.
